title: Freecam
description: Let players toggle spectator mode without op
body:
# What's this mod for?
- Allows player's to enter spectator mode without operator
- Teleports them back to where they were before spectator so they can't cheat and use it to fly around

# Usage
Players can:
- Run `/freecam` to enter spectator
- Run `/freecam` again to exit and go back to where they were
- If they have the mod installed client-side, they can press `Left Alt` instead of typing the command
